name: Texas Gumbo, Basic W/Variations
recipeIngredient: 1 cup okra, fresh or frozen, sliced
2 cups whole kernel corn (hominy is used by some)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the minced onion in bacon fat until yellow and transparent.
2. Add the tomatoes, green peppers, okra, and seasonings. Simmer together until tender (about 20 minutes). If needed, add a little water to achieve desired consistency.
3. Add the corn and cook for an additional 8-10 minutes.
4. Serve over fluffy boiled rice. This is a classic of Texas cooking. Feel free to adjust by adding or removing ingredients as desired. Some additions include Rotel tomatoes, pecan pieces at the end, herb dressing, carrots, and even sour cream.
